# EcomAgent
> Unlimited Claude API access for Claude Code

## Primary URLs
- Homepage: https://ecomagent.in
- Documentation: https://ecomagent.in/docs
- Blog: https://ecomagent.in/blog
- Dashboard: https://ecomagent.in/dashboard

## Key Topics
- Claude Code setup and configuration
- API endpoint: https://api.ecomagent.in/v1
- Free trial: 100 requests, 10M tokens
- Paid plans: unlimited tokens from $69/mo
- Claude Opus and Sonnet 4.6 models
- Crypto payments via CoinPayments

## Support
- Telegram: https://t.me/legit_is_back
